# AGENTS.md

> For human contributors, see [README.md](README.md).

## Project Overview

Refinex-Notes is a Tauri desktop app for AI-native Markdown notes. The repository currently contains a working Phase 0 shell plus frontend/native module scaffolding; the richer target-state design is preserved in [docs/design-docs/README.md](docs/design-docs/README.md).

## Quick Reference

| Task | Command |
|------|---------|
| Install dependencies | `npm install` |
| Build frontend bundle | `npm run build` |
| Run native tests | `cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml` |
| Start web dev server | `npm run dev` |
| Start desktop app | `npm run tauri dev` |
| Lint / format check | Not configured in this repo |

## Architecture

See [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) for the full map.

The repository is split cleanly between React UI code in `src/` and native Tauri/Rust capabilities in `src-tauri/`. Many domain files are still placeholders, so extend the existing layer and directory boundaries instead of creating parallel abstractions. The documents under `docs/design-docs/` describe target architecture and implementation decisions; they are reference material, not proof that a module is already implemented.

## Key Patterns

- Frontend code is layered under `src/components/`, `src/editor/`, `src/stores/`, `src/services/`, `src/hooks/`, and `src/plugins/`.
- Shared client state uses Zustand stores in `src/stores/`; hooks such as `src/hooks/useAuth.ts` stay thin over those stores.
- Editor model/schema code belongs in `src/editor/`; React-facing editor shells in `src/components/editor/` should consume that core instead of redefining document semantics locally.
- React components should talk to native capabilities through service/IPC seams, not by embedding file, Git, auth, or search logic directly in UI components.
- Native entry points belong in `src-tauri/src/commands/`, with domain logic grouped under `src-tauri/src/{ai,git,markdown,search}`.
- Placeholder modules are explicit in this repo (`尚未实现` errors and `占位模块` comments); prefer filling those files before introducing new top-level structure.

## Module Guide

| Module | Purpose | AGENTS.md |
|--------|---------|-----------|
| `src/` | React UI shell, stores, services, and component hierarchy | [AGENTS.md](src/AGENTS.md) |
| `src-tauri/` | Native desktop shell, IPC commands, and Rust domain modules | [AGENTS.md](src-tauri/AGENTS.md) |
